families.effect: Gain an extra magazine and an extra turn of ammo per magazine. Gain [Spray]
Gain a +1 to disguise checks, uses subsonic ammo
Limb shots debilitate targets by removing their ability to sprint if hit in the leg, or reducing any action involving two hands by one dice.
Increases damage by 1. You only have one cylinder with 3 turns of ammo.
Alters rounds to be subsonic, retains damage.
Gain [Burst]
Only Equippable as a secondary, lose a magazine and a turn of ammo per mag.
Gain +1 to damage, uses Subsonic ammo. Replace the ability to [Spray] with [Burst]
Gain an extra turn per magazine, Gain +1 to disguise checks in Social Stealth as it's easier to conceal.
Increases wound threshold division by 1 for center mass. Aiming and hitting center mass now halves the wound threshold.
+1 to stealth, can be concealed easier and provides a +1 to Disguise in social stealth
Gain [Burst] alongside [Spray], increase damage by 1.
All 1's are no longer considered automatic failures. Cannot Jam.
Aiming can be used as a bonus action, has a cooldown of three turns.
Gain a +1 to your roll when in Close range of your target.
Each magazine has an extra turn of ammo
Aiming for limbs no longer takes away a dice.
Carry 1 extra magazine, +1 when firing from ELR. Does not apply to EELR.
As a bonus action, you can load a slug round that has a custom range band of -1 C | +1 L | -2 ELR
Firing at a soft wall can turn it into cover. Can be used as a breaching tool for a bonus action instead of a full action.
Firing at a soft wall can turn it into either cover or remove it entirely. Gains the ability to [Spray].
Each magazine has an extra turn of ammo, Gain an extra magazine.
+1 to navigate checks when making a shot from EELR.
+1 to stealth and disguise checks. Easier to conceal in cases and luggage, +1 to disguise when in social stealth.
Spend a turn charging your rifle to negate navigate rolls in exchange for a flat +2. Aim bonuses do not count. Charged rounds have +1 penetration.
Reduces your capacity to 3 turns, you now have 3 magazines. Gains [Burst].
Gain the ability to [Spray].
Increase damage by 1. When in close range of a target, add a malus of -2.
